title: OldPigs
description: A resource pack that brings back the old pigs and gets rid of the new breeds! basically a resource pack for anyone who doesn't like/want the new pigs but still want to play on the newest version!
body: A resource pack that brings back the old pigs and gets rid of the new breeds! basically a resource pack for anyone who doesn't like/want the new pigs but still want to play on the newest version! Have fun!
